title: YIL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: The latest Yantra India Limited (YIL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Company Secretary posts! Published on the official YIL website, this new recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum age limit of 50 years and possessing Associate/Fellow Membership of ICSI, working knowledge of computers, and a minimum of 5 years post-qualification experience as a Company Secretary in a company registered under the Companies Act can apply through offline mode. Find all details about the YIL Company Secretary new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, appli
last_date: 15 days from the date of publication of Advertisement

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 15 days from the date of publication of Advertisement

qualification.education_qualification: Associate/Fellow Member of ICSI, Working knowledge of computer, Minimum 5 years post qualification experience as Company Secretary in a company registered under Companies Act
qualification.details: Associate/Fellow Member of ICSI Working knowledge of computer Minimum 5 years post qualification experience as Company Secretary in a company registered under Companies Act

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for YIL Company Secretary Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:ddpdoo.gov.in .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15 days from the date of publication of Advertisement
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the YIL Company Secretary position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the YIL Company Secretary recruitment is 13th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Company Secretary post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be an Associate/Fellow Member of ICSI and possess a working knowledge of computers. Additionally, a minimum of 5 years of post-qualification experience as a Company Secretary in a company registered under the Companies Act is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Company Secretary post is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Company Secretary role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 1,20,000/- to Rs. 1,30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for YIL Company Secretary recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Company Secretary post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy available for the post of Company Secretary in Yantra India Limited (YIL).

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Company Secretary position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Company Secretary post will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Yantra India Limited located?
faq.answer: Yantra India Limited (YIL) is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra, with the pincode 440021.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity for the post of Company Secretary at Yantra India Limited.
